title: Bridge Essay: Differential relationship between meditation methods and psychotic-like and myst

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Differential relationship between meditation methods and psychotic-like and mystical experiences.** — PLoS One. PMID: 39636885. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0309357. Much work has investigated beneficial effects of mindfulness-based meditation methods, but less work has investigated potential risks and differences across meditation methods. We addressed this in alarge pre-registered online survey including 613 mediators where we correlated participants' experience with fifty meditation techniques to psychotic-like experiences (PLEs) and mystical experiences. We found apositive correlation for both PLEs and mystical experiences with techniques aiming at red...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 7 (Emptiness). Evaluation: Good (score=2.3)
